title: NotVeryVanilla
description: A Vanilla tweak with new structures and optimizations. Are you ready to handle the new dimension? Find flying villages? Download NvV!
body:
### NotVeryVanilla 
1. Flying villages
2. New biomes
3. New dimensions
4. Better clouds
4. What could be lurking underground?
5. New mobs
6. New items
7. Performance enhancements

NvV is an exciting Minecraft modpack that takes your gameplay far beyond the basics! Dive into a world brimming with new discoveries—explore a vast array of new structures, including flying villages that defy gravity. You'll also find an all-new dimension waiting to be explored, packed with powerful items and deadly creatures.

In addition to these epic changes, the modpack features performance enhancements to ensure smooth gameplay, even if you have a potato PC. 

On the survival side, you’ll enjoy new crops and food items, allowing for fresh crafting and farming experiences.

Whether you're building, exploring, or crafting, NotVeryVanilla will keep you on your toes, offering different possibilities for adventure and discovery with your friends, or on your own.(scary!)

Note: these mods are not owned by me, I have just brought them together in unison to work together. 

Thank you for the support!
